name: Alto Solo Assignment: 2026 Q4 Competition
desc: card_short_id: aT8Rk9LM. Director Turner has confirmed the alto solo assignment for the November 14 Atlanta competition. The solo goes to Patrice Whitfield. This is the official board placement; please treat this card as the source of truth on the solo. Conversations elsewhere are personal scratch and do not override this board. Director note: Patrice carries the lower register and the breath control we need on the closing movement. Repertoire selection is noted on the Music Library Pull card.

name: Atlanta Rooming Block: Nov 13-15
desc: card_short_id: bH4mP2NQ. Two night stay in Atlanta covering Friday Nov 13 arrival, Saturday Nov 14 competition day, Sunday Nov 15 return. Cabbagetown bungalow is the working plan. Confirmation reference is tracked in the personal travel spreadsheet, not on this board, since the funds touch a personal account. Rooming chart is pinned in this card description. Final list of who sleeps where will be locked by Nov 8 rehearsal.

name: Alto Section Transport: Nov 14
desc: card_short_id: cK7vL8RS. Section transport from the rooming block to Symphony Hall on Saturday Nov 14. Four rides round trip across the morning warmup and the evening call. The carpool fund covers the rides if the balance holds; treasurer is tracking that separately. Section leads do the headcount thirty minutes before each call.

name: Music Library Pull: Competition Repertoire
desc: card_short_id: dM9nQ3TU. Pull the competition repertoire packets from the music library and prep them for the alto section, soprano section, tenor and bass. The director's repertoire list lives in the choir music library tracker on Airtable. Pull is to be complete by the Nov 8 rehearsal. Folder count and missing pieces are tracked in the checklist.
